item.title: Writing
item.description: Academic Stuff (what I’ve put here so far) Project Report - Materiality and Identity Queering Barthes - Science Fiction and the WWE go back.

item.title: Queering Barthes - Science Fiction and the WWE
item.description: INTRODUCTION: Queering and Cripping Wrestling Mythologies PART 1: The Myth of the Straight Fight – Queering Barthes through Punk vs.

item.title: Project Report - Materiality and Identity
item.description: Introduction Formulating the question and identifying stakeholders Some thoughts about method The interview Preliminary findings and observations References home other writing Introduction The research question that forms the basis of this report is exploring how individual subjects who come from v...

item.title: More about me
item.description: I have recently completed an MSc in Sociology (the course is called Culture & Society) at the London School of Economics and Political Science.

item.title: Home
item.description: Speculative Sociologist | Qualitative Researcher | Narrative Ethicist Hey, welcome to my tiny corner of the internet. Here’s a little bit about me.

item.title: My work (some of it)
item.description: Animal Think Tank UK - Qualitative Research for Psychographic Segmentation (January 2026-present) I am leading the qualitative research for a project involving psychographic segmentation of UK populations exploring ethical and moral relationships to animals.

item.title: Other work
item.description: a sidequest in ethnographic research - writing collating field notes for social movement organising.

item.title: Reading / watching list
item.description: (i read and watch a lot so this is just stuff that’s somewhat relevant to my work, and is in no particular order) Dominion (2018), it’s a documentary, here’s the link Stuart Murray, Autism and the Posthuman - related short film called In my Language Carol J.
